extDescription.message: Generate heuristic questions and in-depth answers to aid deep understanding of content.

unsupportedPage.message: Current page does not support Reading Sessions

unreadableSite.message: This site is not supported for Reading Sessions

pageContentTooShort.message: Page content is shorter than $1 characters

autoEnterReadingModeLabel.message: Automatically enter deep reading mode on page load

autoEnterReadingModeHint.message: When on, pages detected as articles automatically open in full-screen deep reading after they finish loading. You can turn it off anytime; when off, you can still click the toolbar icon to enter manually.

autoEnterToggleTooltip.message: Toggle whether to automatically enter deep reading on page load (global setting)
